manifest.name: M02_P0215_EMPLOYEE_DISCIPLINARY_PROCESS
manifest.summary: Manage employee disciplinary records, explanations, reviews, and decisions.
manifest.description:
Employee Disciplinary Process (M02_P0215)
        =========================================
        Supports the employee disciplinary workflow from violation recording to
        explanation, review, disciplinary level determination, decision issuance,
        employee acknowledgement, and effective-period tracking.

        Key Features:
        - Master data for violation categories, violation types, and actions.
        - Store Level and Company Level handling paths.
        - Portal flow for managers and employees.
        - Meeting, decision, compensation, and attachment tracking.
        - Repeat-offense and effective-period tracking.
manifest.author: PSM

record_rules.name: PSM Discipline Record Store Manager Scope
PSM Discipline Explanation Store Manager Scope

feature_summary: Portal and website controllers for recruitment pages and application flow.
Dedicated recruitment groups, access rules, and security bridges.
Seed data for sequences, stages, approval categories, mail templates, cron jobs, and surveys.
